welcome.title: Welcome to SchemaScribe
welcome.subtitle: A modern, offline-first, and privacy-focused knowledge management tool.
welcome.tagline: Where your ideas take root, connect, and flourish.
feature.ai_structure.title: Structure with AI
feature.ai_structure.description: Transform raw text into hierarchical schemas and expand your nodes with new ideas using the AI assistant.
feature.visualize.title: Visualize Your Connections
feature.visualize.description: Explore your knowledge as an interactive idea tree, revealing the deep structure of your schemas at a glance.
feature.learn.title: Truly Learn
feature.learn.description: Generate study cards and memorize key concepts with an integrated spaced repetition system (SRS).
feature.privacy.title: Your Knowledge is Yours
feature.privacy.description: Works 100% in your browser, without servers. Back up all your work with encryption protected by your own password.
welcome.cta_support: Your first canvas, "My First Schema", is waiting for you.
error_diagnostic.title: Error Diagnostics
error_diagnostic.explanation: This shows a list of technical errors that have occurred in the application. If you have a problem, copy this report and share it with the support team.
error_diagnostic.explanation.privacy: Your personal data or the content of your schemas are not included here.
error_diagnostic.empty_state: All good! No errors have been logged.
command_bar.ai_helper.create_schema.prom: Paste your text here to turn it into a self-explanatory schema...
command_bar.ai_helper.expand_node.title: Assistant: Expand Node
To expand, first select a node in the schema.
command_bar.ai_helper.generate_flashcard: Cannot generate cards for a node without an ID.
To generate cards, first select a node.
Could not save the generated cards.
command_bar.password_modal.description.e: Enter a secure password to protect your backup. You will need this password to import it.
command_bar.password_modal.description.i: Enter the password with which this backup was encrypted.
command_bar.operation_failed_details: Check the console for more details.
ai_view.title: AI Actions Menu
file_explorer.delete_confirm.title: Delete "{title}"
file_explorer.delete_confirm.description: {itemType} and all its contents will be permanently deleted.
file_explorer.state.empty_folder_message: Create a new schema or folder to get started.
main_view.title: Main Command Menu
page.status.load_error: There was an error loading the document.
page.status.empty_schema.message: Your schema must contain a list to generate the visualization.
page.status.empty_schema.hint: Start writing and use '*' or '-' followed by a space to create an item.
doc_view.placeholder.title: What is the title of your schema?
